narrative:
Precinct New Phila 4-B (precinct in Tuscarawas County) has 791 registered voters, with 51.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.4%, a modest Republican lean of 3.7 percentage points.
